creator: charon@labs.gr
text:
On 2001-12-06 21:10:20, darklogik@pittgoth.com wrote:
>
> Should I just make up a patch, or is this something with legal
> issues that, even though the page looks horrid, should it just be
> left untouched?

Unfortunately, strings.1 is under contrib/ and patching it would take
it off the vendor branch.  This means that when future imports are
done for binutils, it would have to be manually merged with our local
changes :(

David O'Brien is the binutils guy, so it's his decision, I think.

-giorgos
